name: design-loop
description: Codex-ready design-aware sub-track for feature-loop-codex and feature-loop. Wires web-UI design evals, records design-of-record provenance, supports portable reference mockups when Claude Design is unavailable, and produces Gate-2 visual evidence without relying on Claude Code Workflow scripts.

interface.longDescription: Use Design Loop with feature-loop-codex for web-UI features: state matrix, portable design-of-record references, token and contrast checks, provenance, advisory fidelity diff, and Gate-2 visual evidence. Claude Design sync remains optional and Claude-only; Codex uses the portable reference path.
defaultPrompt: Run the design sub-track for this web UI feature.
